# ab-stat-os (compiled output)

This directory contains the **compiled HTML pages** for the
"Статистика A/B-тестирования" course, served via GitHub Pages.

## Source

The source materials (Markdown lectures, YAML configs) live outside
this repository at `~/projects/lab/ab-stat-os/`.

## How to update

1. Edit source `.md` / `.yaml` files in `~/projects/lab/ab-stat-os/`.
2. Regenerate HTML pages from the source (no automated script yet —
   currently done manually or with AI-assisted generation).
3. Copy the updated HTML into this directory.
4. Commit and push.

**Do not edit the HTML files here by hand** — changes will be
overwritten on next regeneration from source.
